tasks.intent:
Extract boat listing data from this private seller results page.

Click the listing TITLE TEXT (blue text below the photo) to open the detail page.
IMMEDIATELY read the URL from the browser address bar.
Scroll down 5 times past photos to find Description section.
Look for phone numbers in Description: (305)555-1234 format.
Extract: Year, Make, Model, Price, URL, Phone (or none).
Press Alt+Left to go back to results.

done(success=true, summary='Year: 2018 | Make: Sea Ray | Model: 240 | Price: $42500 | Phone: none | URL: boattrader.com/boat/2018-sea-ray-240-12345/')

loop.pagination_intent: Click 'Next' at bottom of results page

_note: Approach 3: start directly on by-owner page, skip filter UI
